payload.answer: Committed supported memories: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane. Did not commit the AI infra/article exchange as a durable preference or fact beyond conversational intent.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: The transcript clearly refers to Sam, Goldman, Point72, Bill Evans, and early Coltrane without needing additional disambiguation.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans, and lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
